name: Herbes De Provence
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all herbs in a bowl.
2. Mix well to ensure even distribution of flavors.
3. Transfer the mixture to an airtight jar.
4. The herb blend will remain fresh for up to 4 months when stored properly.
This recipe dates back to the 1800s.
Orginated: Joan Tucker, Victoria B.C.
Source: The Times-Colonist Newspaper Feb 9/94
From the collection of K. Deck
